author: anon-581fd578
content: Decision: The best approach is to process glyphs BEFORE batch building, not after. In generate_render_commands, after creating RenderNodes with NodeContent::Text(glyphs, color), I'll rasterize each glyph, upload to atlas, and get UVs. Then the PositionedGlyph data (which the batch builder reads) already has correct positions. The batch builder creates GlyphInstances — I need to store atlas UVs IN the PositionedGlyph (or add a separate mapping). Actually, the cleanest fix: rasterize glyphs in flatten_node_to_render (where we have text_engine access), store atlas regions, then after batch building patch GlyphInstance UVs using a parallel lookup by index.
